subcodes.first_line: O thou spreader of the Fragrances of God! O thou herald of the Kingdom of God! Thy letter was received from Leipzig.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناشر نفحات الله ای منادی بملکوت الله نامه شما از لایپزیک رسید الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @growth of the Cause
